---
title: "Lesson 4: The Invariance Property of MLE"
subtitle: "Statistical Estimation for Data Science and AI"
---

::: {.column-margin}
{{< video 01_the-invariance-property.mp4 >}}

[Transcript](01_the-invariance-property.en.txt)

:::

## Slides

## Reflection
